---
title: "Space n°8 - Borders"
date: "2026/06/21"
date-format: "[Page mise à jour le :] DD/MM/YYYY"
lightbox: false
format:
  html:
    grid:
        sidebar-width: 0px
        body-width: 1200px
        margin-width: 400px
        gutter-width: 1.5rem
---

**Projet éditorial 2025-2026 : Space n°8 - Borders**

## La plaquette

{{< pdf file="projet_edito_2025-2026/Test_Carthageo_Bibliographie_Unifiee_2025.pdf"  height="400px">}}

## Visualisations interactives

::: {layout-ncol=3}

:::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="height:350px"}
### World Borders
[![](projet_edito_2025-2026/img/world_borders.png){.well width=80% fig-align="center"}](projet_edito_2025-2026/world_borders.qmd)
::::

:::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="height:350px"}
### Trading Posts
[![](projet_edito_2025-2026/img/trading_posts.png){.well width=80% fig-align="center"}](projet_edito_2025-2026/trading_posts.qmd)
::::

:::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="height:350px"}
### Bird Migrations
[![](projet_edito_2025-2026/img/bird_migrations.png){.well width=80% fig-align="center"}](projet_edito_2025-2026/bird_migration.qmd)
::::

:::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="height:350px"}
### Colonization of the US
[![](projet_edito_2025-2026/img/us_colonization.png){.well width=80% fig-align="center"}](projet_edito_2025-2026/colonization_united_states.qmd)
::::

:::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="height:350px"}
### Commuters Monaco
[![](projet_edito_2025-2026/img/commuters_monaco.png){.well width=80% fig-align="center"}](projet_edito_2025-2026/commuters_monaco.qmd)
::::

:::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="height:350px"}
### Gentrification Montreuil
[![](projet_edito_2025-2026/img/gentrification.png){.well width=80% fig-align="center"}](projet_edito_2025-2026/gentrification.qmd)
::::

:::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="height:350px"}
### International Organizations of Africa
[![](projet_edito_2025-2026/img/orgs_africa.png){.well width=80% fig-align="center"}](projet_edito_2025-2026/international_organizations_africa.qmd)
::::

:::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" style="height:350px"}
### School Segregation
[![](projet_edito_2025-2026/img/school_segregation.png){.well width=80% fig-align="center"}](projet_edito_2025-2026/school_segregation.qmd)
::::


:::
